shape.lat: number — user latitude in decimal degrees
shape.lon: number — user longitude in decimal degrees
shape.label: string — human-readable location label

notes: section-3 (closest-store selection and presentation) consumes the user's lat/lon as the reference point for computing each store's straight-line distance, and may display label as the 'your location' context in the result UI. Same resolved-location object as the section-1--section-2 contract; no separate format.
